summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of the new landing page redesign with dark theme, Framer Motion animations, and content based on Mumble AI features. All 16 test categories passed - landing page loads correctly with all sections, navigation works, and animations trigger properly.
passed_tests: Landing page loads at / with dark theme (bg-[#060A06] on container div)
Navigation bar has 'Mumble AI' logo (data-testid='logo-button')
Navigation bar has Features/How it works/Scenarios anchor links
Navigation bar has 'Start Free' button (data-testid='nav-start-btn') -> navigates to /chat
Hero section (data-testid='hero-section') with 'Learn any language by actually speaking it' heading
Hero has emerald green accent text (text-emerald-400) on 'by actually speaking it'
Hero 'Start a conversation' button (data-testid='hero-start-btn') -> navigates to /chat
Hero 'View Dashboard' button (data-testid='hero-dashboard-btn') -> navigates to /dashboard
Floating karaoke demo card visible on desktop (hidden lg:block) with animated waveform bars
Karaoke demo shows Spanish text 'Hola, me llamo Mumble...' with word highlighting demo
Features bento grid: feature-card-0 'Voice-First', feature-card-1 '50+ Languages', feature-card-2 'Karaoke Tracking', feature-card-3 'Smart Subagents'
Tools section: tool-card-0 'Grammar Check', tool-card-1 'Vocabulary', tool-card-2 'Pronunciation', tool-card-3 'Evaluation'
How it works section: step-0 'Pick your language', step-1 'Start talking', step-2 'Get your plan', step-3 'Practice daily'
Scenarios section: scenario-card-0 'Job Interview', scenario-card-1 'Travel', scenario-card-2 'Restaurant', scenario-card-3 'Small Talk'
Scenario card clicks navigate to /chat
Curriculum section shows mock learning plan with 5 lessons, 'Active' badge, and 'In progress' indicator
CTA section with 'Stop studying. Start speaking.' heading and emerald accent
CTA 'Begin your first lesson' button (data-testid='cta-start-btn') -> navigates to /chat
Footer (data-testid='footer') with Mumble AI branding
Footer navigation links: Practice -> /chat, Dashboard -> /dashboard, Vocabulary -> /vocabulary
Footer tagline 'AI-powered language learning'
Anchor navigation: #features, #how-it-works, #scenarios all scroll correctly
Framer Motion scroll-triggered animations working (useInView with once:true)
critical_code_review_comments: Clean Framer Motion implementation using useInView with once:true for scroll animations
Good use of data-testid attributes on all major interactive elements
Proper responsive design with hidden lg:block for desktop-only elements
Well-structured component with separated animation variants (fadeUp, fadeIn, scaleIn)
Dark theme properly applied via Tailwind classes on container div
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesign fully tested. Key data-testids: navbar, logo-button, nav-start-btn, hero-section, hero-start-btn, hero-dashboard-btn, feature-card-0 through feature-card-3, tool-card-0 through tool-card-3, step-0 through step-3, scenario-card-0 through scenario-card-3, cta-start-btn, footer. All navigation routes tested: /chat and /dashboard work correctly. Framer Motion animations use useInView hook with once:true. Desktop viewport 1920x1080 used for testing. Karaoke demo card only visible on lg: breakpoint.
